target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Widespread collapse of structural elements; extensive debris field covering ground; visible absence of intact load-bearing walls or framing; building reduced to fragmented remains consistent with 75-100% damage.

summary: One building assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence, showing widespread collapse, extensive debris field, and absence of intact load-bearing structures. The overall scene depicts a single large building in advanced state of ruin, with collapsed walls, exposed interiors, and a massive pile of red brick and timber debris covering the ground. The functional impact is complete loss of structural integrity and utility, consistent with the prior assessment.
